completed_tasks.name: Update main entry point to integrate all modules
Create tests for welcome, i18n, and CLI

decisions.decision: Downgrade chalk (5.x→4.x) and boxen (8.x→5.x) to CJS-compatible versions
decisions.rationale: chalk 5.x and boxen 8.x are ESM-only modules, our installer uses CommonJS

decisions.decision: Use simple JSON-based i18n instead of i18next

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 15 to plan environment detection phase
context_notes: Phase 14 installer-foundation completed successfully. All 29 tests passing. Installer has npm package structure, Windows platform detection, welcome banner with chalk/boxen, CLI options (--help, --version, --lang, --no-color), and bilingual support (en/zh). Ready for Phase 15 environment detection.
